R = Benefits refused, or evidence not 
submitted

9/1976) (obsolete 6/30/2000)

adjustment (eff. 9/1976) (Obsolete 
6/30/2000)

(eff. 9/1976) (Obsolete 6/30/2000)

X = MSP cost avoided — generic

project (obsolete 6/30/2000)

reimbursement made due to
